title: capsicum frutescens var. pendulum
intro: Capsicum frutescens var. pendulum, also known as the Malabar pepper or pendulum pepper, is a type of plant belonging to the Capsicum genus and is a variety of the hot pepper plant. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Capsicum frutescens var. pendulum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
